# Abu Dhabi Approval

> Expert engineering and authority approval services across Abu Dhabi, UAE. We handle DMT, municipality, civil defence, ADDC, ITC, IDAS, and all government approvals, plus engineering design services. Part of the DAS and Partners Engineering Consultancy network.

## Authority Approvals

- [DMT Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/dmt-approval.html): Department of Municipalities and Transport permits and approvals
- [Abu Dhabi Municipality Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/abu-dhabi-municipality-approval.html): Building permits and municipal clearances
- [Al Ain City Municipality Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/al-ain-city-municipality-approval.html): Al Ain municipal approvals
- [Al Dhafrah Region Municipality Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/al-dhafrah-region-municipality-approval.html): Al Dhafrah regional approvals
- [Abu Dhabi Civil Defence Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/abu-dhabi-civil-defence-approval.html): Fire safety and life safety compliance
- [ADDC Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/addc-approval.html): Abu Dhabi Distribution Company electricity and water connections
- [ITC Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/itc-approval.html): Integrated Transport Centre approvals
- [Department of Health Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/department-of-health-approval.html): DOH healthcare facility approvals
- [IDAS Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/idas-approval.html): Infrastructure Design Approval System
- [ADAFSA Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/adafsa-approval.html): Abu Dhabi Agriculture and Food Safety Authority approvals
- [ADSSC Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/abu-dhabi-sewerage-services-company-approval.html): Abu Dhabi Sewerage Services Company approvals
- [Abu Dhabi Airport Free Zone Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/abu-dhabi-airport-free-zone-approval.html): ADAFZ project approvals
- [Abu Dhabi Airports Company Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/abu-dhabi-airports-company-approval.html): ADAC approvals
- [Al Ain Distribution Company Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/al-ain-distribution-company-approval.html): AADC electricity and water connections
- [AUH Malls Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/auh-malls-approval.html): Mall fit-out and tenant approvals
- [DCT Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/dct-approval.html): Department of Culture and Tourism approvals
- [Industrial City of Abu Dhabi (ICAD) Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/industrial-city-of-abu-dhabi-approval.html): ICAD industrial project approvals
- [KIZAD Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/kizad-approval.html): Khalifa Industrial Zone Abu Dhabi approvals
- [Masdar City Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/masdar-city-approval.html): Masdar City project approvals
- [Reem Developers Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/reem-developers-approval.html): Reem Island master developer NOCs

## Engineering & Design Services

- [Storm Water Network Design](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/storm-water-network-design.html): Drainage network design and hydraulic studies
- [Road Design & Traffic Diversions](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/road-design-and-traffic-diversions.html): Road design and traffic diversion planning
- [Villa Design](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/villa-design.html): Villa architectural, structural and MEP design
- [Building Design](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/building-design.html): Residential and commercial building design
- [Parking Design](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/parking-design.html): Car park layout and circulation design
- [District Cooling Design](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/district-cooling-design.html): Chilled water network design
- [Buildings Structural Evaluation](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/buildings-structural-evaluation.html): Structural integrity assessment and reports
- [Pipeline Design](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/pipeline-design.html): Utility and infrastructure pipeline design
- [Building Entrance Approval](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/building-entrance-approval.html): Building entrance and access design
- [Permit & NOC for Excavation and Shoring](https://www.abudhabi-approval.com/permit-and-noc-for-excavation-and-shoring.html): Excavation and shoring permits and NOCs
